skill1.kitLine: Activates at the start of battle and when Full Burst ends. Affects self. ATK ▲ 80.04% for 5 sec.
skill1.note: Only the Full-Burst-end activation is modeled. The battle-start activation of the same line is UNMODELED (see unmodeled.skill1[0]) — engine has no battleStart trigger and passive-trigger buffs ignore durationSec (sim.ts:983-993).

skill1.kitLine: Activates at the start of battle: ATK ▲ 80.04% for 5 sec (battle-start activation only).
skill1.note: Not override-expressible today: engine lacks a battleStart trigger; passive-trigger buffs ignore durationSec. Single 5s window at t=0 over 180s fight — negligible DPS impact.

skill1.kitLine: Activates when entering Full Burst. Affects self. True Damage ▲ 35.05% for 15 sec.
skill1.note: Exact values. trueDamagePct is flavor-gated so it only applies to swap-window true-damage normals.

skill2.kitLine: Affects all enemies. Damage Taken ▲ 10.09% for 5 sec.
skill2.where: skill2[0] (trigger passive, target enemy, buff damageTakenPct 3.36)
skill2.note: S2 is a 15s-cooldown pulse (cooldown absent from DB text; Prydwen confirms 15s). Modeled as uptime-averaged permanent: 10.09 × 5/15 = 3.36. Approximation smooths pulse timing.
Boss-inert: the sim's partless boss does not fire/charge/reload, so a stun changes nothing. Genuinely-skippable class.

skill2.kitLine: Affects all allies. True Damage ▲ 140.49% for 10 sec.
skill2.where: skill2[1] (trigger passive, target allies, buff trueDamagePct 93.66)
skill2.note: Uptime-averaged permanent: 140.49 × 10/15 = 93.66. Same 15s-cooldown pulse approximation as the enemy debuff.

burst.kitLine: Affects self. Changes the weapon in use. Damage: 200.64% of final ATK. Duration: 10 sec.
Additional Effects — Affects self: Normal attacks deal true damage for 10 sec.
burst.where: burst[0] (trueNormals: true on the weaponSwap effect)
burst.note: Engine-flavored: trueNormals stamps trueFlavor on swap shots so self 35.05 + team 93.66 True Damage buffs apply (trueDamagePct is flavor-gated). Verified firing per ks-extracts findings.

burst.kitLine: Affects targets hit: Damage Taken ▲ 6.04% for 5 sec.
burst.where: burst[1] (trigger shotFired, target enemy, fbGate inFb, buff damageTakenPct 6.04/5s)
burst.note: Gated fbGate:inFb — swap window ≈ FB window for a bursting B2. Applies per shot fired during the swap.

documentedConfounds.text: Battle-start ATK ▲ 80.04%/5s activation not expressible (no battleStart trigger in engine).
documentedConfounds.why: Single 5s window at t=0 in a 180s fight; ~2.8% of fight time with one buff active. Negligible DPS contribution.
Partless boss does not fire/charge/reload; stun changes zero damage events.

documentedConfounds.text: S2 15s cooldown absent from DB text; Prydwen-sourced. Both S2 effects modeled as uptime-averaged permanents rather than timed pulses.
documentedConfounds.why: Averaging is first-order correct for a support buff/debuff over many cycles. Board ratio 0.988 (within ±3%) confirms no material gap from this approximation.

documentedConfounds.text: Swap-window shot economy unmeasured (~1.044 HOT per ks-extracts finding F6).
documentedConfounds.why: The number of SR shots that fit in the 10s swap window is not independently verified. If the sim fires too many or too few swap shots, true-damage DPS scales linearly. The ~1.044 figure suggests a ~4.4% overprediction in the swap window that partially offsets the overall 0.988 underprediction.

documentedConfounds.text: Override materialized 2026-07-16 from offline parser (blablalink prose); NOT hand-verified.
documentedConfounds.why: Provenance caveat, not a mechanical gap. Values match char-extracts exactly; ks-extracts confirms true-damage buffs verified firing with exact values.

authorIntentSummary: The override models Takina as a B2 support whose kit revolves around a 10s weapon-swap burst window dealing true damage, amplified by self (35.05%) and team-wide (140.49%, uptime-averaged to 93.66%) True Damage buffs that are flavor-gated to swap shots only. S2's 15s-cooldown pulse (DB text omits the cooldown; Prydwen-sourced) is approximated as uptime-averaged permanents for both the enemy Damage Taken debuff and the ally True Damage buff. The one known-not-yet-faithful spot is the swap-window shot economy (~1.044 HOT): the exact number of SR shots landing in the 10s window is unmeasured, and the battle-start ATK buff activation is unexpressible in the current engine.
